cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]obdélník 80 × 50 pixelů[/hlp], ale [hlp]jednu kratší stranu nechte přerušenou[/hlp] — zvedněte pero a přesuňte se bez kreslení.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
